arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “I can’t remember a game in which we haven’t suffered”
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti spoke after the win against Leganes at the Santiago Bernabeu on Saturday. Given what we did in the first half, we didn’t deserve them, but they caught us out on two counterattacks and, without balance, they scored.”

arts.ttl: Real Madrid target Man Utd's Fernandes - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Real Madrid plot £90m move for Man Utd captain Bruno Fernandes, Man City are interested in Barcelona midfielder Pedri and Chelsea are keen on Barca defender Jules Kounde.

arts.ttl: Mbappé nets twice to maintain Madrid title hopes
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé struck twice to guide Real Madrid to a 3-2 home win over relegation-threatened Leganes on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 3-2 Leganes: Highlights, man of the match, stats as magic Kylian Mbappe hits brace in comeback win at Bernabeu
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe scores twice as Real Madrid come from behind to record a 3-2 victory over Leganes at Bernabeu in La Liga on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé equals Cristiano Ronaldo Real Madrid record with MOTM display vs Leganés
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé has on Saturday evening secured for himself an altogether noteworthy piece of recent club history. This comes owing to the Frenchman’s efforts in Real’s latest…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 3–2 Leganes: Player Ratings As Kylian Mbappe's Brace Saves Los Blancos' Season
arts.sum: Real Madrid secured a 3–2 victory over Leganés thanks to a brace from Kylian Mbappé and a goal from Jude Bellingham.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fans show appreciation for one player during Leganés clash

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham's 'special' quality revealed as Marco Reus shares inside knowledge
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham signed for Borussia Dortmund in 2020 when he was just 17 and former team-mate Marco Reus has admitted he always knew the Real Madrid star was destined for greatness

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes wanted by Real Madrid in blockbuster move as Man Utd price tag emerges
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has rescued Manchester United on many occasions this season but now the club are bracing for a £90million bid from Real Madrid for their captain after his stellar displays

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé in 2nd: Real Madrid players with the most minutes this season
